breaking_news_suggestions.headline: New "What would change our verdict" module added to Overview tab
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The review now prominently surfaces four falsifiable conditions — any one sufficient to upgrade a verdict. All four currently unmet or pending. The module is persistent above the fold, making the review's epistemic standards explicit to every visitor.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Direct response to "you've predetermined the verdict" rhetorical attack; makes falsifiability conditions permanently visible
